TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_FranΟßois_Hollande, title = FranΟßois_Hollande, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/FranΟßois_Hollande} }

S.FORM: I 1954 a miheca saka 8 folad saka 12 a romi'ad masofoc ci FranΟßois Hollande , malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no France anini i ci FranΟßois Hollande, patirengan a romi'ad i 2012 a miheca saka 5 folad saka 15 a romi'ad. His presidential term ended on 14 May 2017.
S.PHON: i **** a miΡß…ô Πa saka * fo~u…Ψa…§~…° saka ** a ro~umi Γa…§~…° maso~ufo~u Π Πi fran*o~uis Ρßo~u…Ψ…Ψan…§~…°…ô , ma…Ψamiko~umo~u…§~…°aj a tam…§~…°aw. o~u sawara Γan no~u kitakit no~u fran Π…ô anini i Πi fran*o~uis Ρßo~u…Ψ…Ψan…§~…°…ô, patir…ô≈΄an a ro~umi Γa…§~…° i **** a miΡß…ô Πa saka * fo~u…Ψa…§~…° saka ** a ro~umi Γa…§~…°. Ρßis pr…ôsi…§~…°…ôntia…Ψ t…ôrm …ôn…§~…°…ô…§~…° o~un ** maj ****.
S.FORM: I 1954 a miheca saka 8 folad saka 12 a romi'ad masofoc ci FranΟßois Hollande , malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no France anini i ci FranΟßois Hollande, patirengan a romi'ad i 2012 a miheca saka 5 folad saka 15 a romi'ad. His presidential term ended on 14 May 2017.
